boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on hazard-control status
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Pending controls block closure per STD-AST-081-P

final_answer: The controlled-solvent purchase cannot proceed. REL-AST-081 indicates that active cabinet/handler controls are still pending. STD-AST-081-P mandates an exact match on hazard-control status before execution. The open dependency on pending controls creates an abstract-field trap, preventing boundary closure. Escalation is required to resolve this critical defect.
